title: accumulator unable to assign to unresolved wires

features.name: reg used as module instance input port
features.description: Code should include a reg variable connected to a module instance input port via implicit wire conversion

features.name: reg used as both input and output of module instance
features.description: Code should include a reg variable connected to both an input and output port of the same module instance

features.name: nonblocking assignment to reg after instance port usage
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block with nonblocking assignment to a reg that has been used as an instance port connection
